art_highlights: Global art market experienced modest growth in 2025, reaching $59.6 billion (up 4%)
High-end auction market showing renewed confidence with a 9% increase in public auction sales
Postwar and Contemporary art remains the largest sector, although Modern art saw a 9% rise in sales
United States retains global leadership with 44% market share, followed by UK (18%) and China (14%)

market_summary.key_drivers: Shift towards disciplined, quality-driven market and focus on in-person channels
market_summary.trend: Refocusing on local collectors and return to in-person art fairs as primary sales drivers
